title: iwie textures 1.21
description: Use the textures from the Mod "I want it earlier" instead of the Mojang ones for 1.21
body:
# iwie textures 1.21

This resourcepack adds alternative textures for the new blocks and items from the mod [I want it earlier](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-want-it-earlier) to vanilla Minecraft for the users that like our textures more than that from Mojang  

Some textures may look the exact same as that from Mojang

**Not affiliated with Mojang AB or Microsoft**
